title: The VoxWorld Platform for Multimodal Embodied Agents
research_areas: T17 Multimodality, Cross-modality (including Sign Languages, Vision and Other Modalities), Multimodal Applications, Grounded Language Acquisition
T03 Dialogue, Conversational Systems, Chatbots, Human-Robot Interaction
